Task: When legal, financial, or data information is involved, confirmation screens are provided prior to any final form submission.
The keyboard focus indicator is clearly visible and has a minimum area equivalent to a 2 CSS pixel thick border around the focused element, except situations where no visible change is required.
Controls with the same functionality or destination are combined within a single target area that is at least 24 by 24 CSS pixels.
Content is logically organized using section headings.
Emoticons, emojis, ASCII art, and other non-markup language constructs are supported with equivalent text alternatives and conveyed to assistive technologies.
